name: Jellyboxd Sync
description: Two-way sync of watched, rating and favourite (movies & series) with Jellyboxd, plus a rating widget in the web client.
overview: Connect your Jellyfin server to your Jellyboxd account.

versions.changelog: Initial public release: movies + series sync (watched / rating / favourite), seasons & episodes watched, and an in-page rating widget. Authenticated per-user via a personal Jellyboxd sync token.
